# Stream by Sandbar

## The private voice ring for everything on your mind

156 followers

## The private voice ring for everything on your mind

156 followers

Visit website

Knowledge base software

•

Wearables

•

AI Dictation Apps

Stream is a private voice ring for everything on your mind. Notes, Chat, Dictation—in one. To use Stream: just press, speak, and release. Stream can capture notes, dictate across apps, and respond to questions via earbuds or connected speakers. As a self extension, Stream supports your thinking through thoughtful questions and intelligent responses, rather than having an independent identity of its own.

Sensei [...] Stream Ring is always available, so you can engage with thoughts the moment they arise. It keeps you in control of the conversation; listening as you hold and interrupting with a tap. The personal mic picks up your voice clearly, even in loud places. And you can effortlessly resume your music, skip songs, and change volume with familiar gestures.‍ No need for wake words, lock screens, always-on mics, getting spoken over, or talking loudly in public. Plus, it's much more comfortable and ergonomic than fiddling with earbud controls.  
  
My cofounder Kirak & I originally met at CTRL-labs, a neural interface startup acquired by Meta. We've been building Stream for 2 years now, and are joined by a team of engineers, designers, and creatives in NYC.

## superwhisper

superwhispersuperwhisper

Extremely accurate, voice to text for Mac & iPhone

4.9 · 21 reviews

Learn more →

Local-first dictation is where superwhisper separates itself: it can run offline with on-device models, or switch to cloud models when that makes sense. That flexibility makes it a stronger fit than Wispr Flow for privacy-sensitive work, unreliable internet, or anyone who wants predictable performance without a network dependency. results.title: Discord Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

 15 views

•1 review

An excellent application with a wide array of uses ranging from personal, enterprise, or community-related scopes. The monetization policy is fair and provides something for all different types of users. It provides a great scope of settings and options to tailor it to your particular use. In my experience I have had some persistent issues that have not been fixed after a long while: incorrect camera orientation with the user and how it displays for everyone in the voice channel on iOS devices, audio sharing issues on desktops while streaming for some applications (particularly voice chat), and very frequent updates (at least on the MacOS version).

Report

 8 views

•1 review [...] #### What's great

Report

 16 views

•4 reviews [...] #### What's great

real-time collaboration (15)community building (46)

Report

 83 views

Streamdal

Streamdal

•4 reviews

I've been an early adopter and watching this app grow over the years has been amazing! Discord is a fantastic piece of software! I've been able to replace most of my social media use with it. It's like a hybrid of everything you would want: forums, streaming, messaging, and voice chats (similar to slack huddles, or old school VoiP stuff like teamspeak or ventrillo, but much better). The engineering department is fantastic, and they have been ramping their development in recent years, and refactoring services for performance (read the somewhat recent go -> rust refactors over the past few years). I highly recommend!
